title: App Dev Club Questions — dream-to-image app
html:
Yahir pitches the dream app idea to OSU's App Dev Club: voice-record a dream on waking, pipe to ChatGPT for cleanup/expansion, then pipe to Midjourney to render the dream as image. First documented version of an idea that recurs in 2023 04 06 Pros and Cons of Investment Internship and 2023 10 04 Project Ideas.

dream app idea · ai side project itch · chatgpt · midjourney · osu
